content.en:
The area of the Tibetan God Pavilion is not large, and the interior is a book of classics.

However, the texts here are not paper texts, nor jade slips, but stone texts.

Book-sized stone slabs are stored on bookshelves, and these stone slabs are densely engraved with handwriting, and each word contains infinite mysteries.

It can be said that every classic here is not an ordinary classic, but it is precious.

Ye Tian briefly flipped through it and found that many of the classics here were cultivation secret techniques, many of which were chaotic alchemy, and there were many fragments of chaotic alchemy.

There are not many classics here, but they are also relative to the sect, in fact, there are at least hundreds of thousands of classics here!

"Yun Zi Divine Maiden, I need a Chaos Alchemy Classic!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes, then these Chaos Alchemy Classics will all be given to the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, I can choose the same amount of other secret art books, and then square the remaining classics!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden said.

She also knew that she was at a loss by doing so, because these Chaos Alchemy Techniques were not simple, and they were even more powerful than the Chaos Alchemy Technique of the God of War Tower.

But without Ye Tian, she wouldn't have been able to get here safely.

So, it's okay for her to suffer a little bit.

Besides, this time the gain is great, and she doesn't care about this loss.

"Thank you!"

Ye Tiandao.

He didn't want to monopolize these Chaos Alchemy Classics alone, but if he didn't monopolize them, he wouldn't be able to use these Chaos Alchemy to create his own top-notch Chaos Alchemy.

This kind of classic book can't be copied at all, so you can imagine how precious the Chaos Alchemy Classic here is, it's simply a inheritance!

However, other secret techniques were also very precious, and Ye Tian would not let the Yunzi Divine Maiden suffer too much if he gave up these secret techniques.

Soon, the two of them distributed the books here one by one.

The Hidden God Pavilion was the place where the top True Ancestor stored the classics, and there were no other treasures, so the two of them searched for a circle, and after finding nothing else, they left here.

Then, Ye Tian took the Yunzi Divine Maiden to scrape the many treasures of this palace, and scraped all the resources everywhere.

Of course, during this period, he was almost surrounded by the True Ancestor puppet, Ye Tian even included the Yunzi Divine Maiden in the inner universe, and then fled frantically before finally getting rid of the pursuit, otherwise the Yunzi Divine Maiden would definitely be affected and die.

Because Ye Tian and Yun Zi Divine Maiden were cautious, the speed of scraping in this palace was very slow.

Time passed.

In the blink of an eye, it's a month.

On this day, Ye Tian and Yun Zi Divine Maiden finally arrived at the most important main hall of this palace, which was the true residence of that top true ancestor.

Using the Inheritance Key, the two entered the main hall.

What made Ye Tian breathe a sigh of relief was that there was no True Ancestor puppet in this main hall.

Obviously, that top true ancestor is very strong, and he doesn't need the protection of the true ancestor puppet, and this kind of true ancestor puppet is estimated to act as a servant for that top true ancestor, handling some chores for that top true ancestor.

In the residence of this top true ancestor, Ye Tian and Yun Zi Divine Maiden found the inheritance, which belonged to the true inheritance of that top true ancestor.

In front of a statue, the inheritance key shone brightly, seemingly urging the Yunzi Divine Maiden to enter the inheritance space inside the statue.

The Yunzi Divine Maiden looked at Ye Tian and was a little hesitant.

"Yun Zi Divine Maiden, the inheritance of this top true ancestor, you go and accept it!" Ye Tian said.

Inheritance is difficult for two people to accept, and only one person can accept it.

And the inheritance key is the thing of the Cloud Purple Goddess, if he comes to accept the inheritance, it will undoubtedly be too much.

Besides, he really didn't care about the inheritance of a top true ancestor, even if the inheritance of this top true ancestor was better than the inheritance of the Dao ancestor, he didn't care.

"Thank you Wanfa Daozi!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden thanked.

She wouldn't pretend to give in, after all, she really wanted to get this kind of inheritance.

But she won't do nothing and accept the inheritance here.

"Wanfa Daozi, I accept the inheritance here, as for the other treasures, they will all belong to Wanfa Daozi!"

She didn't look for the treasures here, but as the residence of a top True Ancestor, and that top True Ancestor seemed to have expected her death, she also left a legacy, and she should have left some good things.

Therefore, her arrangement should be enough to make up for Ye Tian's loss.

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Wow!

The Cloud Purple Priestess urged the inheritance key and entered the inheritance space.

And Ye Tian also began to look for treasures in this main hall!

There are indeed a lot of treasures here, many things are precious, no matter what Ye Tian is, everything that can be taken away, he has included it in his own body universe.

In a few moments, the main hall became empty.

Most of the treasures here were some furniture, materials, etc., although they were precious, they had not shocked Ye Tian to the extent.

However, Ye Tian still found three Dao weapons, although they were all relatively garbage Dao weapons, but their value was enough to move many True Ancestors.

In the past, a Dao weapon would have been enough to make a top power boil, but with the continuous appearance of the Domain Realm Ruins, Dao weapons would inevitably be very common, and even some True Ancestors could obtain some Dao weapons.

Therefore, it is not a matter to obtain a few Dao weapons.

Ye Tian is still a true monarch now, and he can't use the Dao weapon at all, so no matter how high the value of the Dao weapon is, it is difficult for Ye Tian to get excited.

There were three secret rooms in the main hall, and Ye Tian opened the first secret room, and after seeing the contents inside, he was immediately shocked.

Six True Ancestor Puppets!

Ye Tian was very vigilant at first, but soon found out that these were six puppets that had not recognized the master and had not been activated.

True Ancestor Puppet! The value of this thing is so high, in the eyes of some people, it is even more precious than a Taoist weapon.

Without saying a word, Ye Tian immediately put away the six puppets, lest the Yunzi Divine Maiden come out of the inheritance space and see these True Ancestor puppets, she would also be thrilled.

There was only one cyan stone bed in the second secret room, Ye Tian didn't know this cyan stone bed at first, and he didn't understand its use, he just thought it was an ordinary stone bed.

But when he sat on the stone bed, his whole soul was suddenly extremely comfortable, and even his enlightenment cultivation was raised to a terrifying increase in level.

This is a special stone bed that can assist in cultivation.

According to Ye Tian's simple experiment, this stone bed had the effect of calming the mind, improving comprehension, and increasing cultivation speed, and the effect exceeded any auxiliary treasure that Ye Tian had used before.

It can be said that the value of this stone bed alone is afraid to exceed more than ten Dao weapons, or even far exceed.

The stone bed is very heavy and heavy, at least hundreds of thousands of tons, although for a true monarch like Ye Tian, such a stone bed is nothing, but the stone bed is closely related to the main hall, and it is difficult to shake it.

It took Ye Tian a long time, moving the stone bed little by little, before finally separating the stone bed from the main hall.

When the stone bed was accepted into the inner universe by Ye Tian, he breathed a sigh of relief.

At this time, this precious stone bed really belongs to him!

Subsequently, Ye Tian entered the third secret room.

Entering this secret room, Ye Tian was stunned!
